about.intro: I am an AI Automation Specialist from Hyderabad, India, passionate about building intelligent systems that transform how businesses operate. I specialize in designing and deploying AI chatbots, voice bots, and automation workflows that streamline processes and boost productivity.
about.description: With hands-on experience creating 60+ AI chatbots and 5+ voice bots, I help companies automate customer support, HR operations, and internal workflows. I also manage CRM automations using GoHighLevel, ensuring seamless client interactions. Beyond automation, I create tech content on YouTube and Instagram to help others learn and grow in the AI space.

projects.title: AI Virtual Medical Assistant System (Voice + CRM Automation)
projects.impact: Reduced call infrastructure cost by ~30% while handling 50+ calls/day per staff
projects.problem: Healthcare operations depended on external call infrastructure (JustCall), leading to high recurring costs, limited control over call workflows, and manual handling of patient interactions and data capture.
projects.hypothesis: A centralized voice automation system integrated with CRM workflows can reduce vendor dependency, automate call handling and routing, and improve operational efficiency.
projects.architecture:
Inbound Call 
→ GoHighLevel Phone System 
→ Retell AI Voice Engine 
→ Call Routing Logic (GHL Workflows) 
→ CRM Contact Capture 
→ Staff Forwarding / Response
details: Built end-to-end voice automation system inside GoHighLevel
Integrated Retell AI for voice processing and conversational handling
Designed multi-client architecture using sub-agencies with isolated data and configurations per client
Implemented call routing logic, masking, forwarding, recording, and automated CRM data capture for every interaction
Designed multi-tenant architecture with client-level data isolation
Removed third-party vendor dependency entirely (JustCall)
ai_safety: Controlled conversational flows instead of open-ended LLM responses
Defined decision paths to prevent unpredictable outputs
Logging of failed and edge-case conversations for review
outcome: Full removal of external vendor dependency

projects.title: AI-Powered Healthcare Document Extraction System
projects.impact: Reduced manual data entry by 60% and improved operational productivity by 70%
projects.problem: Staff manually extracted patient data from scanned pharmacy documents. The process was time-intensive, error-prone, and not scalable for large document volumes.
projects.hypothesis: An AI-driven document processing pipeline using vision models and structured prompts can convert unstructured documents into structured outputs at scale, with consistent accuracy.
projects.architecture:
Document Upload 
→ Page-Level Chunking 
→ Gemini Vision API (OCR + Parsing) 
→ Structured Prompt Processing 
→ LLM Output Formatting 
→ Excel / CSV Export
details: Designed pipeline to process 1,000+ page datasets per run
Implemented page-level chunking to prevent context loss across large inputs
Built structured prompt schema to enforce consistent field extraction across variable document formats
Extracted patient-level data dynamically, mapping required fields per document type
Generated structured outputs formatted for direct EMR/EHR workflow use
Designed reusable pipeline to handle trade-offs between extraction accuracy and processing speed
ai_safety: Structured prompts to reduce hallucination and enforce output schema
Manual validation checkpoints for extracted fields
HIPAA-aware API usage and data handling throughout
outcome: 60% reduction in manual data entry effort

projects.title: Production Healthcare Chatbot Infrastructure (60+ Bots)
projects.impact: Achieved ~90% response accuracy across production chatbot systems serving healthcare and enterprise operations
projects.problem: Healthcare and internal operations required instant query resolution, reduced staff dependency, and consistent information delivery across multiple departments and client accounts.
projects.hypothesis: Knowledge-base-driven chatbot systems with structured datasets, optimized prompts, and continuous evaluation loops can deliver accurate, scalable, and reliable responses across production environments.
projects.architecture:
User Query 
→ Chatbase Interface 
→ Structured Knowledge Base Dataset 
→ LLM Response Generation 
→ Feedback Loop (Evaluation + Prompt Optimization)
details: Designed and deployed 60+ chatbot systems across healthcare, HR, billing, immigration, and internal operations
Structured datasets and knowledge bases per domain for improved retrieval accuracy
Built prompt workflows and evaluation loops for continuous accuracy tuning
Managed live production systems with ongoing optimization cycles
Executed platform migration from FastBots to Chatbase, reducing operational costs
Scaled infrastructure, handling constraints between dataset retrieval accuracy and flexible responses
ai_safety: Responses restricted to dataset context only
Prompt tuning to reduce hallucinations and out-of-scope answers
Monitoring and logging of failed and low-confidence responses
outcome: ~30% cost reduction after platform migration from FastBots to Chatbase

projects.title: Enterprise LMS and AI Support System for Workforce Training
projects.impact: Achieved 100% compliance training completion across 450+ employees
projects.problem: Training delivery was manual, inconsistent, and dependent on live trainers. Completion tracking was unreliable and the system could not scale across the full organization.
projects.hypothesis: A centralized LMS with automated delivery, tracking, and an AI support layer can standardize training, improve completion rates, and eliminate dependency on manual trainer-led sessions.
projects.architecture:
Employee Login 
→ GoHighLevel Membership Portal 
→ Course Content Delivery 
→ Automated Completion Tracking + Certification 
→ AI Chatbot Support Layer (Post-Training Queries)
details: Migrated full LMS from Teachable to GoHighLevel with complete course architecture rebuild
Designed automated tracking, assessment, and certification workflows
Deployed mandatory compliance courses (HIPAA, HR Fundamentals, POSH, Legal) and service onboarding programs
Integrated AI chatbot as always-available support layer for post-course employee queries
Built custom domain setup and multi-role access configuration
Ensured consistent training delivery at scale for 450+ employees, replacing manual monitoring
ai_safety: Chatbot responses restricted to course-related and domain-specific content
Monitoring of unresolved or escalated queries
Controlled knowledge scope to prevent off-topic responses
outcome: 100% completion rate across all mandatory compliance courses
~80% completion rate across service onboarding programs
Full elimination of live trainer dependency
Successful migration of 8-10 courses with zero content loss
